- Substance use disorders
- Cardiovascular disease
- Diabetes
- Obesity

- Diabetes

The Sydney Harbour Bridge Walkway in Australia features the pedestrian walkway on the East side of the bridge, a popular tourist attraction. The bridge's distinctive arches and steel structure are visible against a clear blue sky. A metal fence, likely part of the walkway's safety barriers, is seen in the foreground. The bridge is situated near the Rocks precinct, a historic area in Sydney.

A page from a label reference guide, specifically focusing on color palettes used for the characters of the human-readable section of a barcode. the page is divided into two sections: the top half shows barcode orientation diagrams with color palettes, and the bottom half shows a detailed barcode with a color palette legend.

the top half of the image shows four barcode orientation diagrams, each with a different color palette. the palettes are labeled as "bottom barcode orientation," "top barcode orientation," "right barcode orientation," and "left barcode orientation." each palette consists of a series of colored bars, each corresponding to a specific character in the human-readable section of the barcode.

the bottom half of the image provides a close-up view of a barcode with a legend that corresponds to the colors used. the legend is labeled as "figure 6. hot color palette." it shows a barcode with a series of colored bars, each labeled with a color name and a corresponding character in the human-readable section of the barcode.

the text on the page provides information about the use of color palettes in barcode labels, stating that the color of the font and the color of the background are always the same for a given character, although the color may not be unique. a technical guide for those who need to understand or create barcode labels.

A photograph of a black and orange double barrel V3 vape mod, with a black box and a black and white background.

A collection of logos for a vape shop, presented in a grid format. each logo features a stylized representation of a vape pen or e-cigarette, often accompanied by colorful graphics and text that reads "vape shop." the logos are designed with a playful and vibrant aesthetic, using bright colors and dynamic shapes to convey the brand's identity. the background is a solid black, which contrasts with the white and colorful logos, making them stand out. the overall style of the image is modern and eye-catching, likely intended for use in marketing materials or online branding.

A protective silicone case for a smok morph 219w vape device. the case is designed to fit snugly around the device, providing a secure and stylish way to carry and protect the vape. the case is displayed against a wooden background, which adds a natural and rustic touch to the overall presentation. the case itself is a vibrant mix of colors, with a rainbow gradient that adds a playful and eye-catching element to the design. the text on the case indicates that it is a "peterborough bargains" item, suggesting that it may be available for purchase at a discounted price. the case also has a lock, providing an added layer of security for the vape device within.

Three vape mods with a gold, black, and red color scheme. each mod has a unique design and a distinct color, with the black one featuring a gold emblem. the gold mod has a black emblem, and the red mod has a gold emblem as well. the text "the colab box mod by plan b supply co and anarchist mfg" is visible, indicating the brand and manufacturer of the devices. the background is plain and white, emphasizing the products.
